name: BCube Primary Typography System
intent: Provide a consistent, child-friendly, highly legible typography system across print and digital outputs.
policies: Do not use decorative scripts for child instructions.
Maintain strong character distinction for a, e, g, 1, I and l.
Use large age-appropriate sizes for Nursery, LKG and UKG.

compiler.finalPromptInstruction: Use friendly rounded educational typography with large, highly legible letters, clear hierarchy, generous spacing and no decorative script text.
